posts.title: Understanding Svelte
posts.content: Svelte is a modern JavaScript framework that compiles components into highly efficient vanilla JavaScript.

posts.title: Getting Started with TypeScript
posts.content: TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that adds static types, making it easier to catch errors early.

posts.title: Building Reusable Components
posts.content: Creating reusable components in Svelte can greatly enhance your application's maintainability.

posts.title: State Management in Svelte
posts.content: Svelte provides a simple and effective way to manage state using stores.
